title: On Start Landing
description: Only usable by the Ender Dragon. Adds a trigger to call when this entity lands.

event.title: Event
event.description:
The event to run when the conditions for this trigger are met.

Sample values:
• ender_dragon: minecraft:start_land

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: The list of conditions for this trigger to execute.

target.title: Target
target.description:
The target of the event.

Sample values:
• ender_dragon: self
